hero.title: Buy, sell, and finance verified vehicles with cross-border confidence
hero.subtitle: Autoilty brings escrow, AI pricing, and dealer-grade inspections to your city across Canada, India, Pakistan, China, and Bangladesh.

features.title: Why drivers choose Autoilty
features.subtitle: Compliant verification workflows, localized financing, and realtime pricing intelligence built for emerging markets.

trust.title: Verified Trust Chain
trust.body: RLS-secured profiles, VIN-backed inspection reports, and marketplace-wide trust badges modeled after AutoTrader and PakWheels.

pricing.title: AI Smart Pricing
pricing.body: OpenAI-assisted valuation engine blends Supabase datasets with local auction comps for instant multi-currency price guidance.

finance.title: Escrow & EMI
finance.body: Stripe, Razorpay, Alipay, and JazzCash integrations unlock low-friction escrow, EMI, and localized payouts.

featuredListings.title: Featured hyperlocal deals
featuredListings.subtitle: Curated inventory refreshed with ISR for lightning-fast Core Web Vitals.
